report.summary: Standup v7: 328 pages live (corrected from 329), CRITICAL new blocker — staged next.config.ts drops standalone output breaking Vercel deploy, FOMC now T-2, rate limiter still 0/6, 1 page queued (aztec-network-guide), 438-file staged batch blocked pending config fix.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Last Cycle (v6)
items: Pages live: corrected to 328 (EOD v5 resolved the one-page discrepancy from v6's 329 count — one slug in PUBLISHED_PAGES lacked a matching page.tsx). Net: stable, no new pages shipped this cycle.

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 1 item carried into this cycle — /learn/aztec-network-guide (Day 37 candidate). v6 incorrectly reported queue as empty; EOD v5 QA sweep caught the remaining entry. Promote to PUBLISHED_PAGES in next publish cycle.

Staged pipeline: 438 files remain staged, uncommitted — unchanged from v6. NEW blocker identified by EOD v5: staged next.config.ts removes `output: 'standalone'` which would break Vercel serverless deploy entirely if committed. Also a staged middleware.ts merge conflict. No safe commit path until next.config.ts is unstaged or fixed.

GSC organic signals: Day 17 — organic clicks confirmed arriving across indexed pages. FOMC is now T-2 (Wednesday Mar 18). Yield/DCA/rate-cut search queries are accelerating. Stablecoin yield, DCA calculator, lending comparison, and defi-yields tracker pages are in the peak intent window.

API health: All 6 data routes structurally healthy (prices 60s, trending 300s, fear-greed 600s, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 300s, defi-yields 300s). Fallback coverage remains 2/6 routes only. Rate limiting still 0/6 wired — unchanged and escalating in urgency with FOMC T-2.

Community content pipeline: 8 community cycles completed today (community.json + v12–v18). BTCFi Twitter thread, Aave V4 thread, Kaito/InfoFi + FOMC prep tweets, Discord exchange review teasers all queued through Wednesday. Social calendar fully loaded.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ EOD v5 cycle-close QA — full QA/Data/DevOps/PM sweep completed. Surfaced new next.config.ts CRITICAL blocker. No regressions introduced. 328 pages validated, 6 API routes structurally confirmed.

NEW BLOCKER 🔴 Staged next.config.ts is dangerous — drops `output: 'standalone'` and bumps staticGenerationMaxConcurrency to 8. If committed as-is, Vercel deploy breaks for entire site. Fix: `git restore --staged next.config.ts` to restore safe working-copy settings before any commit. Also middleware.ts has a merge conflict in working tree.

CARRY-OVER 🔴 Rate limiter — 0/6 public API routes protected. FOMC now T-2. checkRateLimit() exists in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but wired to zero routes. ~30-min programmer task. Highest technical risk on the board.

CARRY-OVER 🔴 438 staged files uncommitted — crypto-cards hub (31 pages), compare pages (92), courses (2), badges, airdrops, 4 new API routes. Now doubly blocked: (1) JSON-LD validation needed on compare/crypto-cards, (2) next.config.ts must be fixed/unstaged first.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required. Blocks gamification + referral hooks across all 328 live pages.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min. Blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx — 2 curly apostrophe TS errors (non-blocking). Quick fix queued.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial — ~9 days remaining. Jefe: add payment method.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 100 published slugs missing page.tsx (30% of 328 pages return 404 in production). Phased scaffolding work needed.
UPCOMING ⚡ Publish Day 37 — /learn/aztec-network-guide ready to promote from PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Fix staged next.config.ts BEFORE any commit (NEW CRITICAL). EOD v5 found that the staged index drops `output: 'standalone'` — committing would break Vercel serverless deployment for all 328+ pages at once. This is a zero-tolerance blocker. Action: `git restore --staged next.config.ts`. Also resolve the middleware.ts working-tree merge conflict. Until this is done, the 438-file batch cannot safely ship. Delegate to Build v5 as its first and only gate-0 task.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiter BEFORE FOMC (T-2 days, Wed Mar 18). Organic clicks are now arriving (GSC Day 17) and the FOMC catalyst drives the highest-traffic queries of the month to our yield/DCA/staking pages. Six live API routes are unprotected — a traffic spike or abuse event degrades all 328 pages simultaneously. Import checkRateLimit() and wire it into /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. ~30 min. This is the single highest-ROI technical task remaining.

PRIORITY 3 — Publish aztec-network-guide (Day 37) + build FOMC catalyst piece. Aztec guide is queued and ready to promote — do it in next publish cycle for a clean Day 37 live. Then use remaining Build v5 capacity to write 'How a Fed rate cut affects crypto yields in 2026' (targeting DCA + lending + stablecoin yield + defi-yields search clusters) — this is the last build window before FOMC on Wed. Pair with Community FOMC prep tweet for max organic reach on rate-cut day.
